column2: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
Available data for 139 countries can be found in the dataset accompanying this release.

Data for some countries are available for some additional years (1990, 1995, 2000, 2010 and 2020).,Renewables here includes: hydro, geothermal, solar (thermal and photovoltaic), wind and tide/wave/ocean energy, as well as combustible renewables (liquid biomass, biogas) and waste (renewable municipal waste), and solid biomass where appropriate.
